title: An old photograph in my drawer
summary: Describe an old family photograph you keep in a drawer and what it shows.
topic: An old photograph in my drawer
prompt: Write 6–8 short sentences about an old photo you keep. Say who is in it, where and when it was taken, and why you keep it. Use a mix of past and present simple.
hintStarters: In the top drawer of my desk in Tbilisi, I keep…
sampleText: In the top drawer of my desk in Tbilisi, I keep one old photograph. The photo is black and white. The corner is a little broken, but I do not want to fix it. The photo shows my father. He is twenty years old and he stands in front of a small wooden house. He wears a long dark coat and a flat cap. He looks at the camera and he smiles with only one side of his mouth. My grandmother stands next to him with her hand on his arm. The picture was taken in a small village in 1972. I never lived in that village. I do not know the wooden house. I look at the photo every Sunday morning. I take it out of the drawer with two careful fingers. My father died ten years ago, but in this photo he is young and strong. I remember his voice when I see his face. I do not show the photo to many people. It is mine, and it is quiet, and it is enough.

sampleAnnotations.phrase: the top drawer of my desk
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: ngăn kéo trên cùng của bàn

sampleAnnotations.phrase: The corner is a little broken
stands in front of a small wooden house
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: đứng trước một ngôi nhà gỗ nhỏ

sampleAnnotations.phrase: a long dark coat and a flat cap
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: áo khoác dài tối màu và mũ lưỡi trai

sampleAnnotations.phrase: smiles with only one side of his mouth
with her hand on his arm
sampleAnnotations.meaningVi: với bàn tay đặt trên cánh tay anh ấy
ở một ngôi làng nhỏ năm 1972

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Mixing present and past simple
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Bạn có thể trộn hai thì khi mô tả ảnh: hiện tại để mô tả người trong ảnh ('he stands', 'he wears'), quá khứ để nói về lúc chụp ('was taken', 'died').
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: You can mix tenses when describing a photo: present for what is in the photo ('he stands', 'he wears'), past for when it was taken or for past facts ('was taken', 'died').

sampleGrammarNotes.title: Possessive 's
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyVi: Dùng 's để chỉ sở hữu: 'father's coat', 'grandmother's hand'. Trong bài, 'her hand on his arm' dùng đại từ sở hữu 'her' và 'his'.
sampleGrammarNotes.bodyEn: Use 's for possession: 'father's coat', 'grandmother's hand'. The text also uses possessive pronouns 'her' and 'his': 'her hand on his arm'.

sampleTranslationVi: Trong ngăn kéo trên cùng của bàn ở Tbilisi, tôi giữ một bức ảnh cũ. Bức ảnh đen trắng. Góc ảnh hơi rách, nhưng tôi không muốn sửa. Bức ảnh chụp bố tôi. Ông hai mươi tuổi và đứng trước một ngôi nhà gỗ nhỏ. Ông mặc một chiếc áo khoác dài tối màu và đội mũ lưỡi trai. Ông nhìn vào máy ảnh và mỉm cười chỉ một bên miệng. Bà tôi đứng bên cạnh ông, tay đặt trên cánh tay ông. Bức ảnh được chụp ở một ngôi làng nhỏ năm 1972. Tôi chưa bao giờ sống ở làng đó. Tôi không biết ngôi nhà gỗ. Tôi nhìn bức ảnh mỗi sáng Chủ Nhật. Tôi lấy nó ra khỏi ngăn kéo bằng hai ngón tay cẩn thận. Bố tôi mất mười năm trước, nhưng trong bức ảnh này ông trẻ và khỏe mạnh. Tôi nhớ giọng nói của ông khi nhìn khuôn mặt ông. Tôi không cho nhiều người xem bức ảnh. Nó là của tôi, nó yên tĩnh, và nó đủ rồi.

mcQuestions.prompt: Where does the writer keep the photograph?
options: In the top drawer of her desk
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'In the top drawer of my desk in Tbilisi, I keep one old photograph'.

options: Her father and grandmother in a village
mcQuestions.explanation: The text describes her father standing with her grandmother in a small village.
mcQuestions.hint: Read the description of the people.

mcQuestions.prompt: How old was her father in the photo?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He is twenty years old'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does her father wear in the photo?
options: A long dark coat and a flat cap
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'He wears a long dark coat and a flat cap'.
The text says 'The picture was taken in a small village in 1972'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence is in the present simple, describing the photo?
options: He stood in front of a wooden house.
He stands in front of a wooden house.
He will stand in front of a wooden house.
He standing in front of a wooden house.
mcQuestions.explanation: When describing what is happening inside a photo, use present simple: 'He stands'.
mcQuestions.hint: Describing a picture uses present simple.

mcQuestions.prompt: Which sentence uses past simple correctly for the year of the photo?
mcQuestions.hint: For a past event, use 'was/were + past participle'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the writer do every Sunday morning?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I look at the photo every Sunday morning'.

mcQuestions.prompt: What does the photo remind her of?
mcQuestions.explanation: The text says 'I remember his voice when I see his face'.

mcQuestions.prompt: Choose the correct possessive form: 'I see my ___ face in the photo.'
mcQuestions.hint: Add 's to show that something belongs to one person.

criticalThinkingQuestion: Why can one small photograph hold more meaning than hundreds of digital photos on a phone?
